sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22903" key="grupani/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γρῡπᾰνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n22903.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become wrinkled</tr_>, of the earth in earthquake, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
